{{Infobox character
| name = The Nye
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[The Nye]] is a character who spoke to [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] warns [[Erastes]] to make sure [[the Nye]] don't get [[Ilana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] is a character who interacts with [[Simon]] and [[Valin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25">''City of Light'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[The Nye]] possess [[essence]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c28">''City of Light'', chapter 28</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“If I do this for you,” the Nye said slowly,<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c20" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|“Make sure the Nye don’t get her. Thanks.”<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|"It has been too long since we were complete," said the Nye.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c25" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
